items.title: Tasmania's court backlog takes a toll as issue hits 'crisis point'

children.content: Routine cases are dragging through Tasmanian courts for years as senior lawyers lament the "crisis" engulfing the state's criminal justice system.

items.title: 'Big loss': Doctors call for fatigue policy review after car crash death

children.content: Doctors are calling for Tasmania's Department of Health to examine its fatigue management policies after a doctor died on the state's roads. Artyom Avetisyan, a cardiothoracic surgery registrar at the Royal Hobart Hospital, has been remembered by hospital staff as a kind and compassionate colleague who will be "greatly missed".

items.title: What happened when the ABC went to uncover Bali's 'Island of Trash'

items.title: The artefacts that tell the story of one of Australia's most notorious cases

children.content: Forty years ago, the chance discovery of a bloodied matinee jacket unravelled a murder conviction. Now, that evidence lives inside a national museum's collection that's too sensitive for public display.
